excerpt: Today, the Dow Jones fell while the S&P 500 and Nasdaq declined slightly, driven by investor concerns over geopolitical tensions and rising oil prices. The future of market trends remains uncertain.

content.introduction: Today, the Dow Jones fell while the S&P 500 and Nasdaq declined slightly, driven by investor concerns over geopolitical tensions and rising oil prices. The future of market trends remains uncertain.
body: The S&P 500 dropped 0.6%, and the Nasdaq Composite fell 0.3%. The Dow Jones Industrial Average shed 784 points, or 1.6%. U.S. crude prices
Stocks fell on Thursday as investors were worried about conflict in Iran, rising oil prices and higher U.S. bond yields.
The Dow, S&P 500, and Nasdaq fell Thursday as Iran fears and higher oil prices gripped stock markets.
